---
title: "OAK Hills Loop +"
---

```{=html}
<script>
document.addEventListener("DOMContentLoaded", function () {
  const title = document.querySelector(".quarto-title h1.title");
  if (!title) {
    return;
  }
  title.innerHTML = title.textContent.replace(
    /(\d+% Gravel)/g,
    '<span style="color: chocolate;">$1</span>',
  );
});
</script>
```



```{=html}
<article class="mobile-route-card" data-bart="MacArthur" data-miles="25.60" data-elevation="3435.70" data-time="181" data-road-quality="78" data-has-gravel="false">
<div class="mobile-route-heading">

<div class="mobile-route-tags"><span class="mobile-route-tag">Wildwood+Leimert ↑</span><span class="mobile-route-tag">Butters Canyon ↑</span><span class="mobile-route-tag">Pinehurst ↑</span><span class="mobile-route-tag">Claremont ↓</span></div>
</div>
<div class="mobile-route-elevation" aria-hidden="true"><img src="../data/routes/oak-hills-pinehurst/profile.svg" alt="" loading="lazy"></div>
<div class="mobile-route-metrics">
<p><span class="mobile-route-label">BART</span><br>MacArthur</p>
<p><span class="mobile-route-label">Miles</span><br>25.6</p>
<p><span class="mobile-route-label">Elev. Gain</span><br>3435.7 ft</p>
<p><span class="mobile-route-label">Time</span><br>~3:00</p>
<p><span class="mobile-route-label">Steep Descent</span><br>0.26 mi</p>
<p><span class="mobile-route-label">Road Quality</span><br><span class="mobile-route-quality" style="background-color:#91cf60;">78%</span></p>
</div>
</article>
```
::: {.panel-tabset}

## Map

<iframe
  src="../data/routes/oak-hills-pinehurst/overview_map.html"
  style="width:100%; height:min(70vh, 560px); min-height:360px; border:none;"
  loading="lazy"
  allow="fullscreen"
  webkitallowfullscreen
  mozallowfullscreen
  allowfullscreen
></iframe>

## Hazards

<iframe
  src="../data/routes/oak-hills-pinehurst/map.html"
  style="width:100%; height:min(70vh, 560px); min-height:360px; border:none;"
  loading="lazy"
  allow="fullscreen"
  webkitallowfullscreen
  mozallowfullscreen
  allowfullscreen
></iframe>

```{=html}
<table class="dataframe table table-striped table-sm">
  <thead>
    <tr style="text-align: left;">
      <th>Hazard</th>
      <th>Distance (mi)</th>
      <th>Percent</th>
    </tr>
  </thead>
  <tbody>
    <tr>
      <td>Flat</td>
      <td>11.88</td>
      <td>46.0</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>Climb</td>
      <td>4.18</td>
      <td>16.0</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>Light Descent</td>
      <td>4.10</td>
      <td>16.0</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>Descent</td>
      <td>2.98</td>
      <td>12.0</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>Steep Climb</td>
      <td>2.19</td>
      <td>9.0</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>Steep Descent</td>
      <td>0.26</td>
      <td>1.0</td>
    </tr>
  </tbody>
</table>
```

## Climbs

<iframe
  src="../data/routes/oak-hills-pinehurst/chunk_map.html"
  style="width:100%; height:min(70vh, 560px); min-height:360px; border:none;"
  loading="lazy"
  allow="fullscreen"
  webkitallowfullscreen
  mozallowfullscreen
  allowfullscreen
></iframe>

::: {.panel-tabset}

### Climbs Only

```{=html}
<table class="dataframe table table-striped table-sm">
  <thead>
    <tr style="text-align: left;">
      <th>Section (avg grade)</th>
      <th>Climb (ft)</th>
      <th>Distance (mi)</th>
      <th>Time (Min)</th>
    </tr>
  </thead>
  <tbody>
    <tr>
      <td>TOTAL</td>
      <td>2,631</td>
      <td>9.8</td>
      <td>92 ± 45</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>1. Wildwood Avenue (5% avg)</td>
      <td>383</td>
      <td>1.4</td>
      <td>14 ± 7</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>2. Leimert Boulevard (6% avg)</td>
      <td>311</td>
      <td>1.0</td>
      <td>11 ± 6</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>3. Butters Drive (4% avg)</td>
      <td>573</td>
      <td>2.3</td>
      <td>21 ± 10</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>4. Pinehurst Road (4% avg)</td>
      <td>345</td>
      <td>1.3</td>
      <td>13 ± 6</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>5. Pinehurst Road (4% avg)</td>
      <td>762</td>
      <td>2.6</td>
      <td>24 ± 12</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>6. Skyline Boulevard (3% avg)</td>
      <td>257</td>
      <td>1.2</td>
      <td>10 ± 5</td>
    </tr>
  </tbody>
</table>
```

### With Rest Periods

```{=html}
<table class="dataframe table table-striped table-sm">
  <thead>
    <tr style="text-align: left;">
      <th>Section (avg grade)</th>
      <th>Climb (ft)</th>
      <th>Distance (mi)</th>
      <th>Time (Min)</th>
    </tr>
  </thead>
  <tbody>
    <tr>
      <td>TOTAL</td>
      <td>2,631</td>
      <td>25.5</td>
      <td>181 ± 72</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>flat or descent</td>
      <td></td>
      <td>1.9</td>
      <td>11</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>1. Wildwood Avenue (5% avg)</td>
      <td>383</td>
      <td>1.4</td>
      <td>14 ± 7</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>flat or descent</td>
      <td></td>
      <td>1.2</td>
      <td>8</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>2. Leimert Boulevard (6% avg)</td>
      <td>311</td>
      <td>1.0</td>
      <td>11 ± 6</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>flat or descent</td>
      <td></td>
      <td>0.3</td>
      <td>2</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>3. Butters Drive (4% avg)</td>
      <td>573</td>
      <td>2.3</td>
      <td>21 ± 10</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>flat or descent</td>
      <td></td>
      <td>2.9</td>
      <td>16</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>4. Pinehurst Road (4% avg)</td>
      <td>345</td>
      <td>1.3</td>
      <td>13 ± 6</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>flat or descent</td>
      <td></td>
      <td>3.1</td>
      <td>19</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>5. Pinehurst Road (4% avg)</td>
      <td>762</td>
      <td>2.6</td>
      <td>24 ± 12</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>flat or descent</td>
      <td></td>
      <td>0.4</td>
      <td>2</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>6. Skyline Boulevard (3% avg)</td>
      <td>257</td>
      <td>1.2</td>
      <td>10 ± 5</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>flat or descent</td>
      <td></td>
      <td>5.9</td>
      <td>31</td>
    </tr>
  </tbody>
</table>
```

:::

## Street Quality

<iframe
  src="../data/routes/oak-hills-pinehurst/road_quality_map.html"
  style="width:100%; height:min(70vh, 560px); min-height:360px; border:none;"
  loading="lazy"
  allow="fullscreen"
  webkitallowfullscreen
  mozallowfullscreen
  allowfullscreen
></iframe>

```{=html}
<table class="dataframe table table-striped table-sm">
  <thead>
    <tr style="text-align: left;">
      <th>mtc_pci_info</th>
      <th>Miles</th>
      <th>Percent</th>
    </tr>
  </thead>
  <tbody>
    <tr>
      <td>Very Good</td>
      <td>8.4</td>
      <td>32.7</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>Good</td>
      <td>5.4</td>
      <td>21.0</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>Fair</td>
      <td>3.4</td>
      <td>13.3</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>Excellent</td>
      <td>2.9</td>
      <td>11.2</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>At Risk</td>
      <td>2.6</td>
      <td>10.2</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>Poor</td>
      <td>1.6</td>
      <td>6.2</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>Failed</td>
      <td>0.6</td>
      <td>2.3</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>Unknown</td>
      <td>0.9</td>
      <td>3.3</td>
    </tr>
  </tbody>
</table>
```

:::
